race.comment: KEAYANG SWEETHEART (5) had to work when racing outside the leader last week but boxed on to finish 3.3m off the winner. Consistent mare who had put together a series of wins and placings prior. Strong claims. HIGHLANDHARTBREAKA (13) continued his good form when beaten only 1.3m into second here last week. Tough draw but came from this row in recording a win and a second in his previous two appearances. ROYAL APPOINTMENT (9) added to a string of top-four results when he came from a wide barrier for a 2.7m third at this venue last time out. Go well again. RANGER RICK NZ (11) may need luck from a tricky draw but the consistency is hard to knock, adding to a string of placings when beaten a head at Horsham last time. LILLY LOTUS (2) will be fitter for recent racing and gets her lowest draw of the campaign so far so may be ready to show more.
